title: Into The Shadows
description: A new quality horror modpack made by FlameTeam
body:
Sometimes the silence in this world is too perfect — so smooth it begins to sound like a lie. You walk along familiar paths, convinced there's no one around. And yet… something feels off. The snap of a twig, though none should snap. A gentle breeze you don't feel on your skin, only hear right behind you.

At first, you ignore it. You know you're alone. But the longer you traverse this peaceful, familiar terrain, the more often you catch a shadow out of the corner of your eye, vanishing before you can turn your head. Something tiny slides across the floor of your shelter, leaving traces you can't match to any creature.

**And then there's that feeling** — heavy, sticky to the back of your neck. As if someone was standing right behind you, too quiet to hear, but too close to forget.

**You're not alone. You never were.** And though you try to convince yourself it's you observing the world, the truth is much simpler…
**The world** is watching **you**. _And something inside him finally decided to reveal itself_.

![In this land, you don't observe your surroundings. They observe you.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f15e432d466ff41b46ca184bd6935aed654e22a_0.webp)
![Optimization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f255b527c1b31d47c469da4398a63613d8dd6890.png)

/// **To play Into the Shadows 2 with friends, make sure you have the same version of the pack and its contents. For your friends to join, host a LAN world and provide them domain generated in chat by mod so they can add your world as "multiplayer server"**
